result.title: Visualizing World Models with Project Genie | Vibe Coding with Gemini
result.description:
How do you visualize the concept of a world model? Coders Kaloyan Kolev and Arden Schager share how they used Google AI Studio to vibe code custom design tools for Project Genie. They demonstrate how hands-on tools like 3D physics sliders and custom animation timelines enable teams of designers and engineers to work together to explore new ideas together. 

Try vibe coding in Google AI Studio yourself: https://aistudio.google.com/apps  

#BuildWithGemini #VibeCoding #GoogleAIStudio

result.title: Identify tax scams fast with Circle to Search & Lens.
result.description:
Don’t let 2026 be the year you fall for a tax scam. Using Circle to Search and Lens, we’re making it easier than ever to quickly identify scam messages so you know what’s real and what’s not. 

Learn how to use these features below and send this to your friends and family who may need the reminder.

#GoogleSearch #CircleToSearch

result.title: A message from @BTS  just washed ashore! 💌
